Our Guests say it best

Felt so comfortable during my visit, originally didn’t have an appointment and needed my nails done on the last minute, they quickly assisted me and and made my nails look beautiful!!! Highly recommend them to anyone!!
Claries Pretorious Sorbet Guest
Great experience. My husband and son had a proper boys night with a cut and shave. The staff was great and I will definitely be visiting the store again.
Jade Groenewaldt Sorbet Guest
What a lovely experience. The ladies were super friendly, super professional, did a fantastic job and I will definitely be back. Thank you ladies.
Jonathan Riest Sorbet Guest

The Sorbet Promise

At Sorbet, it is our mission to provide 100% guest satisfaction, seven days a week and wearing a smile. If you are not totally satisfied with your treatment , talk to us and tell us why and if we can’t turn that frown back into a smile, then your treatment is on us .
